tweets.text: Wyoming figured out digital asset policy years before Washington did. The rest of the country deserves that same clarity now to ensure the U.S. is at the helm of financial innovation.
tweets.summary: Senator Lummis calls for national digital asset regulatory clarity modeled on Wyoming's crypto policy framework.
